items.title: Does Himalayan salt help reduce belly fat?

expanded_element.title: Pink Himalayan Salt: What Is It and Does It Really Benefit Weight Loss?
expanded_element.description: There is no scientific evidence that Pink Himalayan salt directly causes fat loss. It does not burn calories or boost metabolism. Salt can affect water balance in the body, which may cause short-term changes on the scale due to water retention, but this is not true fat loss.
